title: Minimal Storybook Silhouette Logo AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Storybook Silhouette Logo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Single original Minimal Storybook Silhouette Logo for LUMA TALES with subtitle Childrens Reading Room. Subject: one tiny child silhouette reading under a crescent moon and curved tree branch becomes a simple symbolic figure with strong negative space for a childrens reading room, carrying LUMIA SCENT without becoming a busy illustration scene. Scene: Pure white or soft ivory background with large negative space, centered medium-size mark, small symbolic details only when they support the tiny-story feeling. Composition: Clean vector logo composition with refined light serif or delicate handwritten typography, brand name LUMA TALES, subtitle Childrens Reading Room, and 1 to 3 muted colors from Brand name: BRAND NAME Subtitle: CATEGORY, TAGLINE Brand type: children’s reading room, kids creative studio, bedtime story brand, poetic lifestyle brand, art studio, fragrance brand, etc. Core symbol: moon, child,. Signature Elements: Preserved minimal storybook silhouette logo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Color Direction: navy blue, muted grey blue, and warm ivory. Style: Minimal storybook silhouette logo, poetic brand mark, quiet elegant identity design, clean vector edges, soft composition, suitable for childrens brands, storybook projects, lifestyle studios, art brands, or gentle creative identities. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Keep it a logo mark, not an illustration scene;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
